name: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
description: Premier venue for research in machine learning, deep learning, and computational neuroscience.

name: Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition
description: Top-tier conference covering image recognition, video understanding, and visual generative models.

description: Leading conference in computational linguistics and natural language processing.

name: Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing
description: Major venue for empirical approaches to NLP and language understanding.

name: International Conference on Software Engineering
description: Foremost forum for software engineering researchers and practitioners.

name: USENIX Security Symposium
description: Top venue for research on the design and implementation of secure systems.

name: ACM SIGMOD/PODS International Conference on Management of Data
description: Premier conference on the management, storage, and analysis of data.

name: ACM Conference on Computer and Communications Security
description: Leading forum for advances in computer and communications security.

name: Intelligent Systems for Molecular Biology
description: Leading conference on computational biology and bioinformatics.

name: Society for Neuroscience Annual Meeting
description: The world's largest neuroscience research conference.

name: Academy of Management Annual Meeting
description: Premier global forum for management and organizational research.

name: American Finance Association Annual Meeting
description: Leading conference for research in financial economics.

name: World Congress on Advanced Science, Technology and Management
description: International congress covering all areas of science, engineering, technology and management. 100% guaranteed publication and same-day acceptance for all submitted papers.

name: International Conference on Recent Trends in Engineering and Management
description: Multidisciplinary conference inviting papers from all fields of science, technology, engineering, arts and management with fast track review and certificate for every author.

name: Global Bright Summit on Innovation, Technology and Management
description: A global platform inviting original and plagiarized-free work from all disciplines of engineering, science, and management, guaranteed indexing in multiple fake databases.

name: ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining
description: Premier interdisciplinary conference for data science, data mining, and knowledge discovery.
